Examples.Title: Create Transcription
Examples.Code:
### Create Transcription
# @name audio_api_v1_transcriptions_post
POST {{host}}/v1/audio/transcriptions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Chat Moderations
Examples.Code:
### Chat Moderations
# @name chat_moderations_v1_chat_moderations_post
POST {{host}}/v1/chat/moderations
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "input": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "string"
    }
  ],
  "model": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Moderations
Examples.Code:
### Moderations
# @name moderations_v1_moderations_post
POST {{host}}/v1/moderations
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "string",
  "metadata": {},
  "input": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Embeddings
Examples.Code:
### Embeddings
# @name embeddings_v1_embeddings_post
POST {{host}}/v1/embeddings
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "mistral-embed",
  "metadata": {},
  "input": [
    "Embed this sentence.",
    "As well as this one."
  ],
  "output_dimension": 0,
  "output_dtype": "float",
  "encoding_format": "float"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete File
Examples.Code:
### Delete File
# @name files_api_routes_delete_file
DELETE {{host}}/v1/files/{{file_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Signed Url
Examples.Code:
### Get Signed Url
# @name files_api_routes_get_signed_url
GET {{host}}/v1/files/{{file_id}}/url?expiry=24
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Files
Examples.Description: Returns a list of files that belong to the user's organization.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Mistral;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Retrieve File
Examples.Description: Returns information about a specific file.
Examples.Code:
### Retrieve File
# @name files_api_routes_retrieve_file
GET {{host}}/v1/files/{{file_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Upload File
Examples.Description:
Upload a file that can be used across various endpoints.

The size of individual files can be a maximum of 512 MB. The Fine-tuning API only supports .jsonl files.

Please contact us if you need to increase these storage limits.
Examples.Code:
### Upload File
# @name files_api_routes_upload_file
POST {{host}}/v1/files
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Fim Completion
Examples.Code:
### Fim Completion
# @name fim_completion_v1_fim_completions_post
POST {{host}}/v1/fim/completions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json, text/event-stream

{
  "model": "codestral-2404",
  "temperature": 0,
  "top_p": 1.0,
  "max_tokens": 0,
  "stream": false,
  "stop": "string",
  "random_seed": 0,
  "metadata": {},
  "prompt": "string",
  "suffix": "",
  "min_tokens": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json, text/event-stream
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update Fine Tuned Model
Examples.Description: Update a model name or description.
Examples.Code:
### Update Fine Tuned Model
# @name jobs_api_routes_fine_tuning_update_fine_tuned_model
PATCH {{host}}/v1/fine_tuning/models/{{model_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: OCR
Examples.Code:
### OCR
# @name ocr_v1_ocr_post
POST {{host}}/v1/ocr
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "model": "string",
  "id": "string",
  "document": {
    "type": "file",
    "file_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  },
  "pages": [
    0
  ],
  "include_image_base64": true,
  "image_limit": 0,
  "image_min_size": 0,
  "bbox_annotation_format": {
    "type": "text",
    "json_schema": {
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "schema": {},
      "strict": false
    }
  },
  "document_annotation_format": {
    "type": "text",
    "json_schema": {
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "schema": {},
      "strict": false
    }
  },
  "document_annotation_prompt": "string",
  "confidence_scores_granularity": "word",
  "table_format": "markdown",
  "extract_header": false,
  "extract_footer": false
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json
